name: Seed
goal: Build and distribute the Kypr skill skeleton with mandatory encryption, isolated workspaces, and agent-agnostic harness wiring.
definition_of_done: skill/kypr/ exists with all required files (SKILL.md, plugin.json, adapters.json, tiers.json, agents/, commands/, scripts/, integrations/, workspace-state/, references/)
skill/kypr/scripts/verify_encryption.py exits 1 without git-crypt and 0 with it correctly configured
skill/kypr/scripts/install.py --tier standard installs the skill into a target repo without error
CLAUDE.md and README.md are present and accurate
constraints: am_i_done.py must remain deterministic — no inference in the gate
Encryption check in verify_encryption.py must not be weakened or made optional
Kypr skill must follow hedl's distribution model exactly
learning_goals: Validate that hedl's symlink distribution model works cleanly for a second skill
Validate that agent-agnostic skill design is achievable with thin per-harness adapters
assumptions_to_validate: git-crypt is sufficient for personal data encryption without additional tooling
